title: Asian Paints & Berger: India’s Paint Duopoly Explained #shorts
description:
Fun fact: Asian Paints + Berger Paints control 70% of India’s entire paint market.
Even the next three brands together don’t come close.

Now tell me — which brand do you trust for your home walls?

#PaintMarket #BusinessReel #BergerPaints #AsianPaints
